steps.title: Share Your Experience
steps.description: Visited a great spot? Leave a review, add photos, and help fellow coffee lovers discover their next favorite.

items.text: Absolutely the best pour-over I've had in the city. The baristas really take their time explaining each origin — felt like a coffee masterclass. Warm, quiet, and perfect for a working morning.
Incredible espresso bar. They roast in-house and you can watch the whole process. The natural Ethiopian was floral and fruity — completely different from anything I've tasted. A must-visit.
Perfect morning spot. The outdoor patio is beautiful and dog-friendly. Their oat milk cortado is exceptional — smooth and perfectly balanced. Can get busy on weekends but worth the wait.

newsletter.heading: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.body: Get weekly picks of the best new cafés, seasonal specials, and exclusive community reviews — straight to your inbox.
